commands.name: read_raw
commands.description: Read raw signed ADC count from a single-ended channel.

commands.name: read_voltage
commands.description: Read voltage from a single-ended channel.

commands.name: read_differential
commands.description: Read raw signed ADC count from a supported differential pair.

commands.name: self_test
commands.description: Check that the device responds on the configured I2C address.

commands.name: info
commands.description: Return driver metadata and current configuration.
